::: {.border}

{{< video https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tffkugxj8pjf5uxo81y77/test.mp4?rlkey=ogjflq7he8kexi139vx2eme9g&dl=1 
    title='Jupyter Notebooks and Google Colab' 
>}}

Title here

:::

1. Python basics
    1. Data types, variables, and operators
    2. Functions
    3. Classes, objects and methods
    4. Lists, dictionaries, etc.
    5. Flow control
2. Python libraries
    1. Numpy
    2. Pandas
    3. Matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly
    4. Statsmodels, scipy, and scikit-learn
3. APIs
4. Local installation
5. Streamlit
